---
title: "Climate Guest Speakers"
css: /custom.css
#image: files/logo.jpeg
page-layout: full
toc: false

listing:
 - id: featured-speaker
   contents: /speakers
   type: default
   max-items: 1
   page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
   sort: 
     - "date desc"
     - "title asc"

 - id: recent-speakers
   contents: /speakers
   type: grid
   max-items: 3
   page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
   sort: 
     - "date desc"
     - "title asc"
---

<!--Please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

## Featured speaker

:::{#featured-speaker}
:::

## Recent speakers

:::{#recent-speakers}
:::
